arts.ttl: Leeds United sent Illan Meslier verdict after first-half Sheffield United 'disaster'
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier wouldn’t have made the mistake that led to Sheffield United’s opening goal had he not ‘spiralled’ from two mistakes just a couple of minutes earlier. “ Joe Rodon will probably be disappointed that he’s lost his man, I don’t think he’s seen him, when you see his reaction it’s as if he doesn’t know he’s behind him, but could Leeds get a bit of pressure on the ball to stop it coming in?

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as Firpo and Solomon star in Sheffield United win
arts.sum: Daniel James lofted a cross over to Junior Firpo, who headed home his second goal of the season on 72 minutes. The visitors went behind after 14 minutes when Illan Meslier inadvertently palmed the ball into his net.

arts.ttl: Tanaka sends Leeds five points clear in dramatic late win over Sheffield United
arts.sum: Leeds United took a potentially significant step back to the Premier League after showing their comeback spirit again to win a pulsating Yorkshire derby and open a commanding lead at the Championship summit. Having scored late twice last week to clinch a dramatic victory over Sunderland at Elland Road, Daniel Farke’s side delivered when it mattered yet against their promotion rivals, scoring three times in the final 20 minutes to move seven points clear of third-placed Burnley. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Late Leeds double earns vital victory over Sheff Utd to move five points clear
arts.sum: An Illan Meslier’s own goal gave the hosts the lead, but Junior Firpo levelled in the 72nd minute before Ao Tanaka and Joel Piroe’s last-gasp salvo.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United v Leeds United: Championship – live
arts.sum: Championship updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | And read the latest edition of Football Daily 9 min: Off the line by Gruev! Meslier is looking vulnerable on set-pieces. He paws Peck’s corner back towards his own goal – he thought he was fouled, the referee disagreed – and Gruev did brilliantly to stoop forward and head the ball off the line. 8 min A long throw from the left is spilled by Meslier, who is very relieved to dive on the loose ball before any Sheffield United player can get to it. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sheffield United, Leeds United team news confirmed ahead of Championship showdown
arts.sum: Sheffield United, Leeds United announce teams for Championship top-of-the-table showdown.

arts.ttl: Is Sheffield United vs Leeds United on TV tonight? Live stream, channel, kick-off time
arts.sum: Leeds are currently two points clear of Sheffield United in the Championship table and four clear of the automatic promotion places, with a game in hand. Leeds' clash against Sheffield United is scheduled to kick off at Bramall Lane at 8pm on Monday, February 24.

arts.ttl: Sunderland star believes Leeds United position irrelevant as run-in comment made
arts.sum: Sunderland star Luke O'Nein has not given up hope of automatic promotion this season and has sent a message to his team-mates, supporters and the rest of the division that the current league table is irrelevant. While stopping short of saying that's exactly what the Black Cats will do, O'Nein knows it is still a possibility despite a 1-0 home defeat to relegation-threatened Hull City on Saturday denting his side's chances and leaving them eight points behind Sheffield United and 10 behind Leeds before the top two meet this evening at Bramall Lane.

arts.ttl: Unwanted Leeds United development would be “nothing short of a disaster” under Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United are sitting top of the league coming into tonight’s huge encounter with Sheffield United, both sides in the driving seat for automatic promotion this season. Winning at home to Sunderland in the last moment a week ago put Leeds in a very strong position, and victory tonight against Sheffield United would only strengthen their place further.

arts.ttl: How Tactical Changes Could Improve Leeds United’s Performance
arts.sum: Adjustments in formation, pressing strategy, player roles, data usage, and set-piece execution could help Leeds maximize their strengths and reduce vulnerabilities. Teams that adjust formations effectively often see improvements in results, which is why analysts track performance trends and epl odds to assess how tactical flexibility impacts a club’s chances.
